# Test for testcallgraph tool

# Create a simple test file to analyze
mkdir -p testdir
exec sh -c 'cat > testdir/simple.txt << EOF
exec echo "hello"
exec mcpdiff --help
mcpdiff file1 file2
mcp-spy -- trace.json
EOF'

# Test basic analysis
exec testcallgraph testdir/simple.txt
stdout 'Program Executions:'
stdout 'echo'
stdout 'mcpdiff'
stdout 'mcp-spy'
stdout 'Call Graph Edges:'

# Test JSON output
exec testcallgraph -format json testdir/simple.txt
stdout '"test_file":'
stdout '"executions":'
stdout '"edges":'

# Test analyze flag
exec testcallgraph -analyze mcpdiff testdir/simple.txt
stdout 'Analysis: mcpdiff'
stdout 'Line 2:'
stdout 'Line 3:'

# Test list-commands
exec testcallgraph -list-commands testdir/simple.txt
stdout 'Custom Commands Found'
stdout 'exec:'
stdout 'mcpdiff:'
stdout 'mcp-spy:'

# Test help
exec testcallgraph -h
stdout 'Usage:'
stdout 'Options:'
